=== Bob Dylan, Ottawa Ontario, Canada, 5 November 2006 (Jim Cooper).txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan 
Scotiabank Place 
Kanata, Ottawa, Ontario, Canada 
5 November 2006 

CD1 

01 Intro 
02 Maggie's Farm 
03 She Belongs To Me 
04 (Cut) Watching The River Flow 
05 Just Like A Woman 
06 Highway 61 Revisited 
07 Ballad Of A Thin Man 
08 Rollin' And Tumblin' 
09 A Simple Twist Of Fate 
10 High Water (For Charley Patton) 
11 Most Likely You Go Your Way 
12 Tangled Up In Blue 
13 Nettie Moore 

Cd2 

14 Summer Days 
15 Thunder On The Mountain 
16 Like A Rolling Stone 
17 Band Intro by Bob 
18 All Along The Watchtower 

Recorded by Jim Cooper with Sony D5 pro2 and 2 Sennheiser me40/k3mics Transferred by Coopernicus: Sony D5 pro2>dbx2231 EQ>Sony RCD w500c MC>EQ>CD>EAC>WAV>FLAC

Band Members
Bob Dylan - keyboard, harp
Tony Garnier - bass
George Recile - drums
Stu Kimball - rhythm guitar
Denny Freeman - lead guitar
Donnie Herron - electric mandolin, violin, pedal steel, lap steel
